// EnableCustomWeenies: Master toggle for runtime weenie injection. When true, JSON files under Content/Weenies/*.json are loaded at Start() and Harmony-served via WorldDatabaseWithEntityCache.GetCachedWeenie. When false, all custom WCIDs fall through to the vanilla DB lookup (so old SQL-applied rows still work, but JSON edits are ignored).
// LogWeenieRegistrySummary: Log a one-line summary at Start() listing which custom WCIDs were registered (and any JSON load errors). Recommended: keep on while iterating, off once stable.
// LogWeenieRegistryVerbose: Log every property override applied to each custom WCID. Noisy; debugging only.
// EnableTrophyLines: Master toggle for Windblown trophy-line system: per-CreatureType tier drops on kills + bulk turn-in to NPCs that accept the base WCID. Configs live under Content/TrophyLines/*.json.
// EnableSiblingReplacement: When true (default), trophy lines whose ReplaceSiblingWcids list is non-empty will swap sibling WCIDs (e.g. colored Rat Tail variants) to the base WCID at corpse-drop time so players see one consistent name.
// LogTrophyLinesSummary: Log a one-line summary at Start() listing which trophy lines were registered.
// LogTrophyLinesVerbose: Log every drop roll, replacement, and turn-in event. Noisy; debugging only.
// EnableAcademyImbues: When true, Academy weapons purchased from Kaelith (810001) are generated with a random rending imbue.
